name: Steak and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bottom round steak, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the kidney beans and pinto beans in cold water overnight. Rinse them and drain twice until quite dry.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a soup pot over medium heat. Add the steak cubes and brown on all sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
3. Remove the steak from the pot and set aside. Reduce the heat to low.
4. Add the onion, celery, carrot, and garlic to the pot. Sauté until the vegetables are softened, about 5 minutes.
5. Return the browned steak to the pot. Stir in the beef stock or broth and bring to a simmer.
6. Add the soaked kidney beans and pinto beans to the soup. Simmer for 45 minutes or until the beans are tender.
7. Stir in the Tabasco sauce, salt, pepper, and tomato paste. Continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Serve hot and enjoy your steak and bean soup!
